clusters.justification: These terms represent the broad spectrum of emotional, aversive, and autonomic processing, sharing macroscopic co-activation patterns primarily anchored in the salience and limbic systems.
This axis maps onto the cortico-striatal reward circuitry, unifying concepts related to incentive processing, motivation, decision-making, and the computation of subjective value.
Shared co-activation within the default mode network binds these terms into a macro-functional domain dedicated to internal conceptual representations pertaining to oneself and social others.
